content:
### `✶ Generative Lifestyle & Ambient Environments (GEN+ / RIT+)`
Live inside the story: generative music, ASMR-style environments, dream dialogues, memory-soundwalks. The OS listens and reflects. Play a sound generated from the waveform of your past year. Watch your words become light. Let your archive whisper to you in the voice of your future self. This is passive, immersive mythology. An ambient haunt of the self.

### `✶ Translation, Conlang, and Multilingual Myth Systems (LANG+ / GEN+)`
MYTHOS can operate across multiple languages and symbolic alphabets. It includes a constructed language interface that lets users build and evolve private or mythic tongues over time. It treats language like circuitry—composable, remixable, sonically alive. Your conlang becomes a **sacred key**—a symbolic grammar tied to identity, time, and recursion.

---
